CustomField.description: References the source entitlement that was renewed, replaced (converted or upgraded), or refreshed to create the linked renewed entitlement. Used to track entitlement lineage through business transaction cycles
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The original entitlement that was renewed, replaced (converted or upgraded), or refreshed. This field establishes the relationship between the an entitlement and its successor
CustomField.label: Previous Entitlement
